name: Naruto Uzumaki |Trans 🏳️‍⚧️|
description:
This is a bot I originally made in Chai, so I'm moving it here since I can't use Chai anymore due to the "crisis" they're going trough.

This bot is substantialy the same as any other Naruto Uzumaki bot, however, this is an AU where Naruto is a trans man~ 🦊🏳️‍⚧️
